scripts.serve: cross-env APP_ENV=test node scripts/build-config.js && mpx-cli-service serve --watch
scripts.serve:test: cross-env APP_ENV=test PLATFORM_ENV=wx node scripts/build-config.js && mpx-cli-service serve --mode development --watch
scripts.serve:prod: cross-env APP_ENV=prod PLATFORM_ENV=wx node scripts/build-config.js && mpx-cli-service serve --watch
scripts.build:test: cross-env APP_ENV=test PLATFORM_ENV=wx node scripts/build-config.js && mpx-cli-service build --mode development
scripts.build:prod: cross-env APP_ENV=prod PLATFORM_ENV=wx node scripts/build-config.js && mpx-cli-service build
scripts.build:test:wx: cross-env APP_ENV=test PLATFORM_ENV=wx node scripts/build-config.js && mpx-cli-service build --mode development
scripts.build:prod:wx: cross-env APP_ENV=prod PLATFORM_ENV=wx node scripts/build-config.js && mpx-cli-service build
scripts.serve:ali: cross-env APP_ENV=test PLATFORM_ENV=ali node scripts/build-config.js && mpx-cli-service serve --targets=ali --watch
scripts.build:test:ali: cross-env APP_ENV=test PLATFORM_ENV=ali node scripts/build-config.js && mpx-cli-service build --mode development --targets=ali
scripts.build:prod:ali: cross-env APP_ENV=prod PLATFORM_ENV=ali node scripts/build-config.js && mpx-cli-service build --targets=ali
